messages.subject: [R-sig-dyn-mod] Collection of blog posts on dynamic models implemented in R / simecol
messages.subject_clean: [R-sig-dyn-mod] Collection of blog posts on dynamic models implemented in R / simecol
messages.body_plain:
Hello list members,
Here is a collection of posts I am writing on various dynamic models implemented using R and simecol. These models are examples taken from various contexts: economic, biological, military, educational, etc.

https://plus.google.com/u/0/collection/8X5RYB

Regards,
Jos? Romero
Universidad Nacional Abierta (Venezuela)
	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
